programme.title: West of Cimarron 1941
programme.desc: In West of Cimarron, the Rough Riders saddle up for justice! When a ruthless gang threatens to plunge the frontier into lawlessness, Buck Roberts (Buck Jones), Tim McCall (Tim McCoy), and Sandy Hopkins (Raymond Hatton) ride into action. With six-guns blazing and courage unshaken, the trio takes on outlaws, treachery, and danger at every turn in this thrilling chapter of the Rough Riders series.

programme.title: North of Arizona
programme.desc: Perrin is a cowboy who comes to the aid of local Indians being swindled out of their gold. He signs on as a ranch foreman, but learns the ranch is the home of the crooks.

programme.title: The Over-the-Hill Gang 1969
programme.desc: In The Over-the-Hill Gang, a group of retired Texas Rangers prove they’ve still got what it takes when they reunite to clean up a crooked frontier town. Led by Walter Brennan, with Edgar Buchanan, Chill Wills, and Andy Devine along for the ride, these aging lawmen may be past their prime, but their courage, wit, and six-guns make them a force to be reckoned with. Blending lighthearted comedy with classic Western action, this made-for-TV favorite delivers laughs, heart, and a reminder that true heroes never hang up their spurs.

programme.title: Gunfight at Red Sands 1963
programme.desc: In Gunfight at Red Sands, Richard Harrison rides into a border town torn apart by greed and violence. When ruthless bandits threaten the land and its people, a mysterious gunman takes justice into his own hands. With sweeping desert vistas, tense standoffs, and the first-ever Spaghetti Western score by Ennio Morricone, this action-packed tale blazes with the grit and glory of the frontier.

programme.title: Terror at Black Falls (1962)
programme.desc: In Terror at Black Falls, a quiet frontier town is shaken when a bitter land feud erupts into violence. With murder, betrayal, and greed tearing the community apart, one man must stand against the terror sweeping the valley. Gritty, fast-paced, and filled with danger, this hard-hitting Western lives up to its name.

programme.title: The Black Rebels (1960) Colorized
programme.desc: Damon's in black-face as blacks take on whites who take on Hispanics in this very entertaining teenage gang war extravaganza. Teenage punks slice and dice each other, turn innocent young girls into sleazy tramps, threaten innocent citizens, get involved in interracial romance, and sell drugs to local citizens. Whew! That's a lotta trashy behavior for one movie.

Set in the near future, the stories revolve around the evil corporation, 4Ever Innovations, whose young and brilliant scientists download and sell memories. They replace those we've lost with clones and devise technology that helps us live out our greatest fantasies; from saving a failed relationship, to creating the perfect lover, to being irresistible to the opposite sex - but sometimes our deepest desires come at a terrible price. 4Ever offers customers the opportunity to live out their fantasies in a virtual world but there are secrets within 4Ever Innovations that may cost you your life.

programme.title: AFTCO Original Film
programme.desc: Bass fishing takes on numerous forms, from the simplicity of backyard pond fishing to the apex of competitive tournament angling. Yet, within this pursuit lies a distinct niche: trophy hunting via swimbait fishing. Unlike traditional baits, swimbaits stand out in their uniqueness within an angler's arsenal. Ranging from six to twelve-plus inches in length and weighing two to sixteen ounces, these baits require a quiver of specialized equipment and a different mindset. The adage "big bait, big fish" is the guiding principle, firmly centered on catching the biggest bass in the lake, armed with the largest baits from your tackle box.

programme.title: Fortress
programme.desc: In the premiere of Fortress, Sheriff Mark Lamb and co-hosts explore America’s urgent need for security—both personal and societal. They meet a passionate team turning donated land into a homestead that feeds and shelters trafficking survivors. Then, CCW Safe steps in to showcase how legal protection for concealed carriers can be the line between justice and ruin. Powerful stories of resilience, protection, and purpose unfold in this compelling first episode.

Will the All-Stars make it through? Only time will tell.

This season we follow rising star Kanoa Igarashi and seven-time world champ Stephanie Gilmore in the pressure-filled months of the 2019 season’s "fourth quarter," as the ultra-competitive athletes battle it out contest to contest, balancing their personal lives with the professional demands of competing at the highest levels.

programme.title: African Renaissance | Brilliant Corners: Senegal, Episode 3
programme.desc: Sam, Easkey, and Adrien catch up with West African surf legend Oumar Seye, the first West African sponsored surfer. Seye has impacted the surf culture in Senegal in more ways than one, both proving the sport can be more than a hobby and supporting sustainability by banning plastic bags at his surf events. They end their trip in Popenguine, a bohemian beach town where an incredible women-led initiative to plant thousands of trees has made the area one of the greenest parts of the country.
